model_specification_line: model = smf.wls("full_time_employed ~ treatment * post + C(age_2012) + C(year) + C(statefip) + UNEMP + LFPR + DRIVERSLICENSES + INSTATETUITION + EVERIFY + SECURECOMMUNITIES", data=analysis_df, weights=analysis_df["perwt"]).fit(cov_type="cluster", cov_kwds={"groups": analysis_df["statefip"]})
